title: Merathrepta spicata
taxonomy: Merathrepta spicata is a genus of extinct plants belonging to the family Bennettitaceae. The Bennettitaceae family is a group of extinct seed ferns. Merathrepta spicata is thought to have lived during the Triassic period, and its classification is often associated with other extinct plant species from this time. These ancient plants are related to modern conifers and cycads. As a member of the Bennettitaceae family, Merathrepta spicata's classification is closely tied to the broader group of extinct seed ferns.
